variants.name: Default (Open)
variants.html:
What is Vanilla Breeze?

A design system built on native HTML elements and CSS custom properties. No JavaScript framework required.

variants.name: Default (Closed)
variants.html:
What is Vanilla Breeze?

A design system built on native HTML elements and CSS custom properties. No JavaScript framework required.

variants.name: Accordion Group
variants.html:
Getting Started

Install via CDN or npm. No build step required.

Customising Tokens

All design tokens are CSS custom properties on :root. Override them in your stylesheet.

Browser Support

Targets evergreen browsers with graceful degradation where possible.

variants.name: Inline Code
variants.html: Use the Array.prototype.flatMap() method to map and flatten in a single pass.

variants.name: Code Block
variants.html:
function debounce(fn, delay) {
  let timer;
  return function (...args) {
    clearTimeout(timer);
    timer = setTimeout(() => fn.apply(this, args), delay);
  };
}

Harold Abelson, Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs
